creator: stephen@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to John Marino from comment #4)
> To my knowledge, sage is building in FreeBSD 10 but for some reason the
> builders are skipping it.  In any case, there is submitter feedback timeout
> so I'm closing the PR.

math/sage depends upon math/atlas, which is not built on the servers.  That's why sage isn't built on the servers.
